name: Gazpacho Salsa (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1 small green bell pepper, finely diced
1 small yellow bell pepper, finely diced
2 vine-ripened tomatoes, seeded and finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the peppers, cucumbers, tomatoes (seeded and finely diced), and scallions.
2. Toss with olive oil.
3. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
4. At the last moment, add red wine vinegar to taste.
Yield: about 3 cups
